name: moment.js Deprecated
description: moment.js is now a legacy project; consider modern alternatives.
rationale: The Moment.js team recommends against using it in new projects. Alternatives like date-fns, Luxon, or native Temporal API offer better tree-shaking, immutability, and bundle size.
noncompliant_code:
import moment from 'moment';
const d = moment();
compliant_code:
import { format } from 'date-fns';
const s = format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
